user.title: Clockify Overtime Tracker
user.description: Enter your Clockify API key. You can find it at {settings_url}

data.excluded_project_ids: Projects to exclude from billable hours

data_description.working_days: Select the days of the week you are contractually required to work.
data_description.correction_hours: Enter positive hours to add to your balance (e.g. banked overtime). Use negative values to subtract hours (e.g. paid-out overtime).
data_description.excluded_project_ids: These projects are excluded from the billable hours calculation even if they are marked as billable.
data_description.project_sensor_ids: Each selected project gets a dedicated sensor showing total hours booked in the tracking period.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Clockify. Please check your API key and network connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.

abort.already_configured: Clockify Overtime is already configured for this account.

data.excluded_project_ids: Projects to exclude from billable hours

data_description.working_days: Select the days of the week you are contractually required to work.
data_description.correction_hours: Enter positive hours to add to your balance (e.g. banked overtime). Use negative values to subtract hours (e.g. paid-out overtime).
data_description.excluded_project_ids: These projects are excluded from the billable hours calculation even if they are marked as billable.
data_description.project_sensor_ids: Each selected project gets a dedicated sensor showing total hours booked in the tracking period.

adjust_correction_hours.name: Adjust correction hours
adjust_correction_hours.description: Adds (positive) or subtracts (negative) hours from the overtime correction balance.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The Clockify Overtime integration instance to update.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: Hours to add (positive) or subtract (negative) from the correction balance.

reset_correction_hours.name: Reset correction hours
reset_correction_hours.description: Resets the overtime correction balance to zero.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The Clockify Overtime integration instance to reset.
